resources.string: Shaphang
Shaphang ka App
Ka jingshit jingkhriat %1$s ka la hiar sha ka pud jong ngi kaba %2$s
Ka jingpynbna mynstep?
Baroh ki jingkhein por
Ka phang jong ka app
pdeng
Jingmaham: Da kaba pyntreikam ia ka opshon ba la kdew haneng ka lah ban pynduh ia ka battery jong phi kham kloi ban ia kaba ju long
U nongjied rong ba shadien jong ka Widget
Dustur
Ki rong ba la shna kyrpang
Jingjied: URL ba la shna kyrpang
Ka URL ba la buh kyrpang kam shym la set, lane ka long kaba thylli. Phi lah ban leit sha ki jingpynbeit ban pyndap ia ka URL ba kyrpang
Ka phang kaba dum
Ka %1$s URL ka long kaba thylli, sngewbha peit ia ka %2$s file jong phi bad pyrshang biang
Pyndam lut ia baroh ki Data bad khang noh
Thylli
Jingbakla!
Man la ka 5 minit
Man la ka 10 minit
Man la ka 10 sekhon
Man la ka 15 minit
Man la ka 30 minit
Man la ka 30 sekhon
Man la ka 60 sekhon
Man la ka kynta
La lah ban pyniasoh ia ka %1$s data bad ka %2$s data
La lah ban pyntreikam ia ki jingtip ba la antad
La lah ban pyntreikam ia ka %1$s file
La lah ban pyntreikam hok ia ki jingtip jong ka jinglong ka suinbneng na ka server jong phi, khamtam eh ia ki jingtip jong ka %1$s
U nongjied rong ba shakhmat jong ka Widget
Pynrung ia ka URL sha %1$s
Pynbor ia ka rukom dum
Ka sla jingkhein lypa
Iathuh lypa
Man ka sngi
Ka jingkhein lypa (lada donkam)
Ka jait jingkhein lypa ’%1$s’ ka long kaba bakla, peit ia ka file jong ki jingpynbeit jong phi bad pyrshang biang
Ka URL jong ka jingkhein lypa kam shym la buh, buh ia ka ha %1$s
Jingbam jingbam
kynta
ki kynta
Ngan pynbeit bad pyrshang biang
Pyni ia ki jingpule hapoh iing?

Kane ka app lah dep pynthymmai tangba ka server kaba phi connect kam pat lah ban pynthymmai ia ka Inigo Plugin na ka bynta ka weeWX. Ki field ki lah ban ym paw bha tad haduh ban da pynthymmai ia ka weeWX
3 kynta
6 kynta
12 kynta
Man ka sngi
Man ka kynta
Ka jingpynthymmai kam long kaba biang, pynthymmai ia ki jingpynbeit bad nangta pyrshang biang

Ka %1$s mynta ka donkam ia ka %2$s data file na ka %3$s server, phi donkam ban pynthymmai ia ka %4$s bad pynthymmai ia ka %5$s file shwa ba kane ka app kan treikam bha. Nion Ok na ka bynta ki jingtip ba kham bniah ha ka %6$s
Ki jingkhein jingdiah jong u bnai ba la dep
Ka jingkhein jingdiah jong u snem ba la dep
Ka phang kaba jem
Ki jingpynkylla da ka kti
Pynthymmai da ka kti, swipe pynthymmai ia ka skrin ban load
Pyniadei App
Pyndonkam ia ka Metrik?
ki minit
Ka jingshit jingkhriat %1$s ka la kiew sha ka pud jong ngi kaba %2$s
Ka jingpynbna mynstep?
Ki jingjia jong u bnai ban wan?
Em
Ym don ba download ne app ba lah ban setup
Ka jingbit ban pyntip
Ki jingpynbna ki long kiba donkam ban pyntip ia phi haba ka jingshit jingkhriat, ka jinghap slap ne ka jingjur slap ka iahap bad ki kyndon ba la buh jong phi
Namar ba phi la kyntait ia ka jingbit jong ka jingpynbna arsien, phi donkam ban pyntreikam ia ka ha ki jingpynbeit ha ka jaka jong ka, pynlong ia ki jingpynbeit?
To
Sngewbha ap katba ngi dang pynshisha ia ka URL ba phi la submit

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah. Ka jingbakla kaba khatduh ka la jia %3$d minit mynshwa
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah. Ka jingbakla kaba khatduh ka la jia %3$d minit mynshwa
Ka la don ka jingbakla %1$d ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit ia ki %2$s logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah. Ka jingbakla kaba khatduh ka la jia %3$d minit mynshwa
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah. Ka jingbakla kaba khatduh ka la jia %3$d minit mynshwa
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah. Ka jingbakla kaba khatduh ka la jia %3$d minit mynshwa
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah. Ka jingbakla kaba khatduh ka la jia %3$d minit mynshwa

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ka la don ka jingbakla %1$d ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah

resources.string: Radar
La lah ban pynrung ia ka dur radar
Ka dur jong ka Radar ka dang shah pynrung
Ka jait radar ’%1$s’ ka long kaba bakla, peit ia ka file settings jong phi bad pyrshang biang
Radar URL ba la buh. Phi lah ban leit sha ki settings ban pynkylla
Ha ka skrin ba kongsan:
U slap ha ki Inshi?
Ki jingpynbna shaphang ka jinghap slap?
Ka pyntip ia phi man ka sngi lada u slap u poi sha u pud ba la buh
Ka jinghap slap %1$s ka la iadei bad ka jingthew jong ngi kaba %2$s
Jingmaham ia ka jinghap slap
Ka jingthew jong u slap
Ki jingpynbna jong ka jingjur jong u slap?
Ki jingpynbna lada ka jingjur jong u slap ka palat ia ka pud kaba jur katkum ka jingjrong por jong u slap
Ka jinghap slap kaba %1$s ha ki %2$d %3$s ba la dep ka la poi ha ka kyrdan ’Ba jur’
Jingmaham ia ka jingjur jong u slap
Jingpyntip ia ka jingjur jong u slap
Ka jingmaham ia ka jingjur jong u slap?
Ki jingpynbna lada ka jingjur jong u slap ka palat ia ka pud jingmaham katkum ka jingjrong por jong u slap
Ka jinghap slap kaba %1$s ha ki %2$d %3$s ba la dep ka la poi ha ka kyrdan ’Jingmaham’
Jingmaham Jingmaham ia ka jingjur jong u slap
Peit ia ki jingpynbna jong ka jingjur jong u slap?
Ki jingpynbna lada ka jingjur jong u slap ka palat ia ka jingthew ba la buh katkum ka jingjrong por jong u slap
Ka jinghap slap kaba %1$s ha ki %2$d %3$s ba la dep ka la poi ha ka kyrdan ’Peit’
Peit ia ka jingpynbna ia ka jingjur jong u slap
Jied ia ka por pynthymmai
Hato phi kwah ban pynduh ia baroh ki data?
Pynsah ia ki jingthoh jingbakla jong ka app
Save ia ki jingpynbeit
Leit biang sha ki jingpynbeit
Pyni ia ka jingkhein lypa
Pyni ia ka Radar
naduh
Kynthih
Ki jingkhein jingdiah
Dang pynrung ia ki jingtip ba la antad
Dang pynrung ia ki jingtip shaphang ka suinbneng
Pynkhih ia ka jingkhang
Ka rukom treikam
Ka jinglong kaba shit ne khriat
Ki jingpynbna haduh arsien shisngi ynda ka jingshit ka la poi sha ki pud ba la buh
Jingpyntip ia ka jingshit jingkhriat
Ka jingkhein jingdiah jong une u bnai
Ka jingkhein jingdiah jong une u snem
Mynta ka sngi
Ka jingkhein jingdiah mynta ka sngi
Ka jingbakla bym tip ka la jia
Tang ban pynthymmai lyngba ka Wi-Fi?
Set sha ki jingpynkylla da ka kti, hynrei ym pat don jingbuh jingkynmaw
Pynthymmai katba dang iaid
URL la buh ha ka rukom ba la buh lypa lane ka long kaba thylli
Pyndonkam ia ki por pynthymmai kiba thikna
Ym lah ban pyniasoh ne download na ka URL ba la buh kyrpang
Ym lah ban pyniasoh ne download ia ka jingkhein lypa
Ym shym la lah ban pyniasoh ne shim ia ka %1$s na ka %2$s
Ym lah ban pyniasoh ne shim na ka %1$s
Ym shym la lah ban pyniasoh ne shim ia ka dur radar= na ka internet
Ym lah ban pyniasoh ne pynrung ia ki jingpynbeit na ka server jong phi
Ym lah ban pyniasoh ne shim ia ka dur webcam na ka server jong phi
Suin bneng
Webcam
Ka por pynthymmai ia ka Webcam
Ka dur jong ka Webcam ka dang pynrung
Ka URL jong ka Webcam kam shym la set lane ka dang thylli
Ka phang pdeng jong ki tiar
La pynthymmai hynrei ka jingpyniasoh Wi-Fi kam don
Ka jingkhein jingdiah hynnin ka sngi
